programme.title: E6066-001
programme.desc: Discover Japan's oldest private medicinal herb garden in Uda - here the natural landscape from 300 years ago is preserved in a botanical time capsule as a sanctuary of local culture and history.

programme.title: China Financial Intelligence
programme.desc: China Financial Intelligence: Based in Shanghai, the program explores the economic development of mainland China in a comprehensive and in-depth way, so that the world can have a more accurate understanding of China and Shanghai.

programme.title: Final Destination Bloodlines
programme.desc: Plagued by a violent recurring nightmare, a college student heads home to track down the one person who might be able to save her family.

programme.title: Top Chef S17E10 -Colossal Coliseum Kaiseki
programme.desc: With only six chefs remaining, the challenges get even more difficult, when pastry super-chef Sherry Yard awaits the All Stars for a dreaded dessert Quickfire, made even more impossible when chefs must endure a blindfolded taste test to pick their ingredients. Then Michelin-starred Chefs/Restaurateurs Niki and Carole Lidi-Nakayama demonstrate a traditional Japanese Kaiseki meal, the ultimate in simplicity, restraint and precision. The chefs must make this formidable dinner for not just these Kaiseki masters, but in celebration of the Tokyo games with Olympic medalists Diana Taurasi, Rai Benjamin, Nastia Liukin, Ibtihaj Muhammad, Christian Coleman, Kerri Walsh Jennings and NBC Olympic Primetime Host Mike Tirico. The gold medal meal takes place at the iconic Los Angeles Coliseum with Padma, Tom, Nilou Motamed and Niki & Carole Lidi-Nakayama at the judges table.

programme.title: Top Chef S17E10 -Colossal Coliseum Kaiseki

programme.title: E5108
programme.desc: Dr. Abhimanyu, a misogynist, falls for Akshara, their daughter. Complications arise when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, also falls for him.

programme.title: Doggy Etiquette
programme.desc: Marisa's shower stall becomes a kitten birthing suite. Laura, Dawn, and Ziggy hit downtown for another lesson in doggy etiquette. Xavier rescues a confused kangaroo from a coastal caravan park.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E7 - Three Causes, One Death
programme.desc: A wealthy widow's sudden death perplexes investigators. But with conflicting causes of death and millions at stake, suspicion falls on those closest to her.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Reporters
programme.desc: Reporters presents various reports by team of correspondents from all over the world regarding hot button issues. Directly from the suburbs of Ghana's capital Accra or from Chile, Israel or USA, from any place of the globe the reporters tell latest stories and highlight what is going on.

programme.title: Justice
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, safety's a little shaky. So is justice! It's ‘Sheriff' Howler's job to hunt down outlaws and bring them before the judge. But the methods he uses are a trifle different from what we're used to today!

programme.title: E8 - Siblings Month: Pretend Play Fun!
programme.desc: It's time for pretend play fun with the siblings! First, water balloons take their pirate play to the next level for a wet & adventurous journey! Then, inspired by a firetruck, the kids form their very own rescue team to help those around them. The pretend play continues as Baby John becomes a police officer to solve the mystery of the missing cupcakes & Jack becomes a detective to find out who made a mess with the sheep toy!

programme.desc: In the remote wilderness of the Carpathian Mountains lives an elusive predator that has inspired awe and fear throughout history: the Eurasian wolf. Discover the vital role that these once-misunderstood hunters play in protecting their ecosystem.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: Having taken control of the Kinai region, Nobunaga orders the Toyotomi brothers to pressure the merchants of Sakai, including Imai Soukyu (Wada Masato), into paying a levy of twenty thousand kan in arrow taxes, with Matsunaga Hisahide (Takenaka Naoto) acting as their intermediary. But the merchants prove formidable opponents. Meanwhile, the Miyoshi Triumvirate seize on Nobunaga's absence and launch an attack on Honkoku-ji Temple in Kyoto, where the newly appointed shogun Ashikaga Yoshiaki resides.

programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: The Monkey King
programme.desc: Since the beginning of time, there existed in the world three clans; human, god and demon. As everything was destroyed during the great battle, Nuwa (Goddess of Works) used 36,500 magic boulders to repair Heaven. One of them fell accidentally down onto Earth and landed on the Mountain of Flowers and Fruits on an island far across the Eastern Sea. Over thousands of years, the magic boulder absorbed the energies of Heaven and Earth and the sacred lights of the Sun and Moon. A godly creature was nurtured inside the stone-egg and a full-grown monkey burst out from it one day. When the Patriarch Subodhi passed by on his way to collect herbs in the Mountain, he came upon the monkey. Impressed by his exceptional wit and godly he took the monkey back to the Divine Cave of Three Stars in Mountain Mi to teach him the Way and called him Sun Wukong...

programme.title: E48
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E1 - A Super Special Day with Jill!
programme.desc: Join Jill for a super special day of friendship & discovery! First, she's at the playground with her friends when she notices a new girl is there all alone. Jill takes it upon herself to make friends with the girl & make her feel welcome. Then, while all of her friends know what their 'thing' is, Jill is unsure. She tries playing sports & dancing, but none of them stick. Eventually, she discovers that she's really good at arts & crafts & makes friendship bracelets for everyone!

programme.title: E3 - God's Darling: Beetles
programme.desc: Beetles have inhabited the Earth for more than 240 million years. There are around 380,000 kinds of beetles known to scientists and every year hundreds of new species are discovered. One fourth of the world’s animals are beetles. They have conquered almost every corner and every habitat on the planet and they have survived every global disaster. What is it that makes them so successful?

programme.title: E4 - Taro, The Polynesians' Tuber
programme.desc: Taro, long a staple food in the Polynesian islands, is still cultivated today in every archipelago. In the Australs, its cultivation is the most intensive: taro fields are an integral part of the inhabitants' daily lives.

programme.title: Keep Chasing: The Beast Stalker
programme.desc: A traffic accident changed their lives forever. In capturing wanted criminal Zhang Yidong, Sergeant Tang Fei was involved in a gunfight and car accident that put the criminal in a coma. But in the process he also crippled an fellow officer, and mistakenly shot dead the elder daughter of public prosecutor and single mother Gao Min. Unable to handle the guilt, Tang Fei succumbs to a fog of pain. Gao Min, meanwhile, pours all her love and attention to her younger daughter Ling. Three months later, the criminal Zhang Yidong awakens from his coma. Gao Min, who had been working hard on bringing him to justice, insists he stand trial immediately.

programme.title: Regal Studio Presents

programme.title: Lattice Have Fun
programme.desc: Are you a math genius? Or, do you know how to pretend you are? This episode introduces the centuries-old Gelosia method: a math trick that uses a lattice grid to multiply large numbers. How does it work, and will it help you look really smart?

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 故事描繪一位除了愛什麼都不懂的笨拙綁匪與一位不懂愛的天才少女，性格迥異的命運共同體“父女”，展開一段獨特的逃亡旅程。主角新庄政宗（齋藤工）為了籌措患有心臟病女兒的手術費，在妻子的提議下，決定綁架富有的醫院院長之女七瀬凛（永尾柚乃）。新庄一直猶豫不決，但在妻子不斷策動下，他終於開車來到院長宅邸附近時，一名女孩突然衝到他的車前。千鈞一髮之際，避免了事故。當凛醒來時，卻發現她失去記憶。新庄情急之下謊稱自己是她的爸爸，從此被迫開始扮演“父親”的角色。而凛的父母已被某個神秘人物殺害，新庄也因此成為殺人嫌疑犯。然而他所綁架的凛，竟是一位能操多國語言、博學多聞、思維敏捷的天才少女。從這一刻起，原本居於主導地位的新庄反而成了凛的依靠，開始向她尋求擺脫困境的建議，兩人的關係也因此徹底逆轉。除了警方外，新庄與凛還遭到來歷不明、意圖不明的男子追擊。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 謝盈萱等原班人馬回歸出演，天心加盟飾演新角色。 40歲的陳嘉玲從天龍國回到家鄉台南，展開人生下半場。第一件要努力的事就是靠自己的雙手，把買下的鬼屋變成家。但一開始就發生一連串意外，摔傷、被蜜蜂叮，還坐輪椅進了醫院……新的一季看陳嘉玲如何用盡全力，開始書寫另一段人生篇章。

programme.title: E2 - When Magical Pet Powers Run Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for chaos as Magical Pet powers run wild! First, Bubblebear creates so many bubbles that they join together & become a giant Bubble Monster that traps everyone! Then, when Shrubcub gets sick, Pet Port is invaded by wayward vines, & the friends have to race against time to get her some magic tea. The wild powers continue as Slushyseal turns buildings & cars into giant juice pops that start to melt all over town!

Get the lowdown on groundbreaking trends-it's all here, served fresh and hot. With our forward-thinking geniuses, every episode is a thrilling journey into the future that's closer than you might think! This program will start in May 27th, tune in every night at 21:20 for a riveting 15-minute exploration.

programme.title: The Happenings
programme.desc: They are the generation who work hard at living it up at the discos, in midnight car races and occasional fight. They are not happy with the world they live in but are determined to make the most of it. They go racing down the freeway in a stolen car. When stopping at the petroleum station, they find they don't have money. On the spur of the moment, they decide to rob the station. After a fight, King Kong is badly hurt and Cream kills a staff by accident. Bee runs away from the group, badly shaken and frightened by this traumatic experience...

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Magnificent Team
programme.desc: Chicken, Wing and Zita worked in the same police station. Chicken used to make friends with many gangsters; Wing is a pro in computer knowledge; Zita came from a affluent family but devoted to her work. Zita was transferred to Chicken‘s team as their superintendent was termed “The Team in Vain”. Chicken was found to have committed a serious mistake in a mission and was sacked. Zita, as Chicken's girlfriend thought he would reform. However, to her disappointment, Zita discovered Chicken became a procurer in one of her missions. A series of murder was reported, the victims were all teenagers and were killed after they met with a friend from Internet. Wing was assigned to be the bait in this case...

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 謝盈萱等原班人馬回歸出演，天心加盟飾演新角色。 40歲的陳嘉玲從天龍國回到家鄉台南，展開人生下半場。第一件要努力的事就是靠自己的雙手，把買下的鬼屋變成家。但一開始就發生一連串意外，摔傷、被蜜蜂叮，還坐輪椅進了醫院……新的一季看陳嘉玲如何用盡全力，開始書寫另一段人生篇章。

programme.title: E317
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: E317
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Paul departs from Tokyo and travels northward by bullet train, pausing to soak in the serene mountain springs of Unazuki Onsen, explore the shimmering gold leaf of Kanazawa and meet the master craftsmen keeping Wajima's lacquerware traditions alive.

programme.title: Osmosis
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand are back in their kitchen lab! In today's episode, the doctors follow the movement of water in your cells and show you an experiment to make an egg fountain!

programme.title: Crime Story
programme.desc: Eddie Chan, a guilt-ridden cop trying to silence his demons from a recent shoot-out who is assigned to rescue kidnapped businessman Huang Yifei. It is a trail that leads Chan and his partner, Hung from Hong Kong to Taipei and back to Hong Kong. As the trail gets warmer, Chan begins to suspect that there are internal forces – including Hung – who seem to working against him...

programme.title: E32 - Sully-Sur-Loire - Le Hallier
programme.desc: The Sange Tower of the Sully-sur-Loire castle, a former watchtower, offers a breathtaking view. Its exact use remains unclear, but it probably served the soldiers. Not far from Pithiviers, in Nibelle, the Hallier castle was a gift from King Charles IX to Marie Touchet.

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & goodnight songs! First, Mia giggles with delight as she gathers four of her favorite stuffed animals into bed with her for a fun game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The bedtime fun continues as Maple & Muffin play a game of 'Five Little Monkeys' during their bubble bath. Then, Grandma Panda helps Mia & Bari embark on a fantastic adventure, building a little rocket out of cushions to go on an adventure to the moon!

programme.title: Project Gutenberg
programme.desc: Lee Man, a member of a notorious money counterfeiting ring, is arrested in Thailand and extradited back to Hong Kong. Thanks to renowned painter Yuen Man, Lee is offered a deal by the police: Reveal the identity of Painter, the charismatic leader of the counterfeiting ring, and Yuen can bail him out. Lee has no choice but to comply and recount his story. In the 1990s, Lee and Yuen were lovers living together in Vancouver, seeking to be seen in the art world. However, success eludes them, and Lee is forced to go make counterfeit paintings to make a living. Lee's counterfeit paintings catch the eyes of Painter, and he decides to recruits Lee to join his team. Together with Painter's elite team, Lee travels the world in search of technologies to create the “Super Dollar,” a counterfeit bill that circumvents the anti-counterfeiting measures of the 1996 American dollar. But when Lee witnesses Painter's violent methods in action, he becomes desperate to escape his employer's grip..

programme.title: Cracking the Cipher
programme.desc: By shifting the alphabet or replacing one letter for another further down the sequence, a coded message can be deciphered. In this episode, Eric uses the trick to crack an ancient box used by Roman Emperor Julius Caesar. Can you do the same?

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E1 - When Baby Daniel Causes Total Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some total mayhem caused by Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel finds the remote to control Arpo, turning the robot babysitter into everything from an elephant to a bird! Then, Arpo is tasked with cleaning the kitchen, but Daniel just wants to play, making an even bigger mess. From getting covered in mud to being extra noisy while Daddy is trying to sleep, Baby Daniel keeps Arpo on his toes in this fun-filled, chaotic adventure!

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 故事從東京發生的一連串慘烈連環殺人案展開，而案件現場讓兩名記者的命運交織在一起。設樂浩暉（志尊淳）是週刊雜誌的知名自由撰稿人，筒井萬琴則是電視台新聞節目導播（岸井雪乃），敏銳且富有正義感。兩人因追蹤同一起案件而相識，並在攜手調查的過程中逐漸被彼此吸引。然而，隨著調查的深入，浩暉的身分卻越來越可疑，他的過去與案件的關聯也逐漸浮出水面──他，究竟是無辜的旁觀者，還是那個令人聞風喪膽的連環殺人犯？
